title: Create Aero Radars
description: Control swivel bearings from aeronautics with create radars
body:
This mod lets you build anti air with a power of aeronautics, create radars and create big cannons. It has better aiming than regular create radars having only 1 tick of delay insted of 5, has guidance radar, gun convergence, all that combined makes this mod is perfect for making self propelled anti air
